languages.text: {n}В ответ вы слышите ошарашенный вздох.{/n} "Клянусь, мы из-под земли достанем того еретика, который посмел оскорбить действием Лорд-Капитана!"

traits.locale_text: {n}В ответ вы слышите ошарашенный вздох.{/n} "Клянусь, мы из-под земли достанем того еретика, который посмел оскорбить действием Лорд-Капитана!"

languages.text: {n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: {n}В ответ вы слышите ошарашенный вздох.{/n} "Клянусь, мы из-под земли достанем того еретика, который посмел оскорбить действием Лорд-Капитана!"

traits.locale_text: {n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"
{n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"
{n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"

languages.text: {n}你听到对方震惊地倒吸一口凉气。{/n}“我以我的荣誉起誓，我们定会将那胆敢如此冒犯舰长大人的异端揪出来！”
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}你听到对方震惊地倒吸一口凉气。{/n}“我以我的荣誉起誓，我们定会将那胆敢如此冒犯舰长大人的异端揪出来！”

languages.text: {n}Vous entendez un cri de surprise.{/n} « Je vous le jure sur l'honneur, nous allons retrouver l'hérétique qui a osé commettre pareil outrage, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous entendez un cri de surprise.{/n} « Je vous le jure sur l'honneur, nous allons retrouver l'hérétique qui a osé commettre pareil outrage, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »

languages.text: {n}Recibes un respingo sorprendido como respuesta.{/n} «Por mi honor, ¡encontraremos al hereje que se haya atrevido a ultrajarl{mf|o|a} así, Lord Capitán!».
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Recibes un respingo sorprendido como respuesta.{/n} «Por mi honor, ¡encontraremos al hereje que se haya atrevido a ultrajarl{mf|o|a} así, Lord Capitán!».

languages.text: {n}Cevap olarak şok olmuş bir nefes çekişi duyuyorsun.{/n} "Onurum üzerine yemin ederim ki Lord Kaptan'a karşı böyle terbiyesizlik yapma cüretinde bulunan kâfirin kökünü kazıyacağız!"
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Cevap olarak şok olmuş bir nefes çekişi duyuyorsun.{/n} "Onurum üzerine yemin ederim ki Lord Kaptan'a karşı böyle terbiyesizlik yapma cüretinde bulunan kâfirin kökünü kazıyacağız!"

languages.text: {n}Du hörst ein schockiertes Keuchen als Antwort.{/n} "Bei meiner Ehre, wir werden den Ketzer finden, der es gewagt hat, einen derartigen Frevel gegen den Lord Captain zu begehen!"
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Du hörst ein schockiertes Keuchen als Antwort.{/n} "Bei meiner Ehre, wir werden den Ketzer finden, der es gewagt hat, einen derartigen Frevel gegen den Lord Captain zu begehen!"

languages.text: {n}応答として、息を呑む驚きの声が聞こえる。{/n}「我が名誉にかけて、ロード・キャプテンに対しかような暴挙を働いた異端者を、必ずや狩り出してみせます！」
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a shocked gasp in response.{/n} "On my honour, we will rout out the heretic who dared to commit such an outrage against the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: {n}応答として、息を呑む驚きの声が聞こえる。{/n}「我が名誉にかけて、ロード・キャプテンに対しかような暴挙を働いた異端者を、必ずや狩り出してみせます！」
